name: Autumn Stump Smash
description: Autumn Stump Smash is the Fall counterpart of Stump Smash in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He was only available in September 2013.
biography: Autumn Stump Smash is the Fall counterpart of Stump Smash in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He was only available in September 2013.
quote: Autumn Stump Smash has set in around your kingdom!
personality: Autumn Stump Smash is a seasonal guardian of the forest, embodying the spirit of the fall season in Skylands.

story.content: Autumn Stump Smash is the Fall counterpart of Stump Smash in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He was only available in September 2013.

content: Autumn Stump Smash has set in around your kingdom!

trivia: Autumn Stump Smash was only available during September 2013.
He is the Fall counterpart of the Skylander, Stump Smash.
His English voice actor is Kevin Michael Richardson.
He is one of several seasonal Alter Egos featured in Skylanders: Lost Islands.
gameplay: As an Alter Ego in Skylanders: Lost Islands, Autumn Stump Smash functions as a seasonal variant of the character Stump Smash.
